MIRUS

POWER ENDOCUTTER 60mm LARGE

MIRUS by Meril

Endo SurgeryREF: MEC60-440

First powered endocutter with 60° articulation featuring 6-row stair-stepping staple formation design for superior hemostatic effect. Includes non-slip anvil technology and safety protection features.

Technical Specifications

specification60mm stapling length, 60° articulation angle, 6-row staple formation, battery motivated operation, tissue thickness 4.4mm
ManufacturerMeril Endo Surgery Private Limited
MaterialStainless Steel + Polymer Composite
